{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Aether Drive
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] asks why the narrator was hired if they have an [[Aether Drive]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Aether Drive]] is a [[Subspace]] engine powered by magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
